title: Books
intro: What you read shapes who you become.
noActive: Add a book to start your shelf.
noCompleted: Books you finish will land here.

field.author: Author
field.whyReadingPlaceholder: It feels relevant. The author is rigorous. A friend recommended it…

tooManyActive: More than 5 books at once is rarely sustainable. Consider finishing one before starting another.
paceUnknown: Log a few days to see your pace.
completeBody: Capture what you want to remember. You can come back and edit anytime.
reviewPlaceholder: What changed in you because of this book?
confirmDelete: Delete this book? This can't be undone.

yearReview.title: Year in books
yearReview.compoundLine: {n} this year × 10 = {decade} books in a decade. A different person, one chapter at a time.
yearReview.noBooks: No completed books in this year — yet.

feature.categoryCardBody: Track what you're reading, finish more of it, see your year in books.

habitLink.unlinkedBody: Connect Books to a daily reading habit so book pages count toward your streak.

logSheet.title: Log today's reading
logSheet.body: Pick the book you read and add today's pages.
logSheet.noActive: No book in progress yet — add one to start logging.
logSheet.audiobookNote: Audiobook minutes don't count toward a pages-based streak.
